title: Executive Table
description: A four-image reference-dependent boardroom series preserving the same luxury meeting room while rotating the seated executive object.
creative_direction: Image 01 establishes the photorealistic walnut boardroom, suit tailoring, lens height, lighting, and visual joke. Images 02-04 use it as a reference to keep the same executive setting while changing the object identity and material behavior.

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run 01 first. Use its runtime result URL as --ref for 02-04. Queue may run 02-04 concurrently after 01 is done.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only status=done images with image.png are included in works/index.json.

en.title: Executive Table
en.description: A four-image reference-dependent boardroom series preserving the same luxury meeting room while rotating the seated executive object.

zh-CN.title: 高管会议桌
zh-CN.description: 四张依赖参考图的董事会系列,保持同一豪华会议室,更换坐在主位的物体高管。
